_readme: One-tap preset diary nights, added 2026-07-19 so a reviewer can reach different troubleshooter branches in seconds instead of hand-crafting diary values. Each entry is deliberately grounded in the same Kenyan factory/informal-settlement context as the session decks (a shift, a matatu stage, a shared room), not a generic 'bad night'. Each is calibrated against js/troubleshooter.js's flag logic to land on a specific, different branch: see the 'targetBranch' note on each (not read by the app, just documentation).

label.en: Worried about the shift, mind racing
label.sw: Nikiwaza kazi ya kesho, akili haikutulia
label.sheng: Nikiwaza shift ya kesho, akili ilikuwa inarun

label.en: Room was hot, matatu stage noise all night
label.sw: Chumba kilikuwa na joto, kelele za stendi ya matatu usiku kucha
label.sheng: Room ilikuwa na moto, noise ya stage ya matatu usiku mzima

presets.targetBranch: daytime_sleepy -> daytime_sleepy_napped (nappedYesterday, sleepiness kept below 'high' so it does not also match daytime_sleepy_high)

label.en: Napped after a long shift, sleepy all day
label.sw: Nililala mchana baada ya zamu ndefu, nilisinzia mchana kucha
label.sheng: Nililala mchana baada ya shift ndefu, nilikuwa sleepy mchana mzima
